zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Wade是William Wade和Maria Preestlay的女儿，于1589年出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。她于大约1610年与William Cockcroft在荷兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wade (Old English Wada or, via Norman French, from ancient Germanic Wado, of unclear origin but possibly related to Old English wadan ‘to go’).

English: topographic name from Middle English wade ‘ford’ (Old English (ge)wæd ‘ford, especially a tidal crossing’) for someone who lived by a ford, or a habitational name from a place so called, such as Wade Hall in North Cove (Suffolk).
Irish: shortened and altered from Mac Uaid, see McQuaid .

variants.name: Wadeson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Wade  .

variants.name: Wass
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Wace (ancient Germanic Waz(z)o), a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Wad- (compare Wade 1). The name Wace was common among the Normans, alongside the Parisian French variant Gace, and was latinized as Wazo (nominative), Wazonis (genitive).
English (of Norman origin): occasionally, perhaps a variant of Vause with vocalizing of initial V-.
German: nickname from Middle High German was(se) ‘sharp, cutting’.

variants.name: Waide
meanings: Irish: shortened form of Mac Uaid, see McQuaid .

variants.name: Waddy
meanings: English: variant of Wadey, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Wady, a pet form of Wade , or in northern England alternatively a shortened form of Waldo . The name may also be a variant of Wilday .

variants.name: McQuaid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Nuala.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaid ‘son of Uad’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Scottish form McQuate .

variants.name: Waithe
meanings: either a topographic name from Old Norse vath ‘ford’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Waithe (Lincolnshire) and Wath (North and Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Wade was born in 1589, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Wade and Maria Preestlay. She married William Cockcroft about 1610, in Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Wade est née en 1589, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William Wade et Maria Preestlay. Elle a épousé William Cockcroft environ 1610, à Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Wade wurde 1589 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William Wade und Maria Preestlay geboren. Sie hat um 1610 in Niederlande William Cockcroft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Wade è nata il nel 1589 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William Wade e Maria Preestlay. Lei sposato William Cockcroft circa 1610, nel Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Wadeは1589年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでWilliam WadeとMaria Preestlayの娘として生まれた。約1610年にオランダでWilliam Cockcroftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Wade(은)는 1589년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 William Wade(와)과 Maria Preestlay의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1610년 네덜란드에서 William Cockcroft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Wade nasceu em 1589, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William Wade e Maria Preestlay. Ela casou-se com William Cockcroft aproximadamente 1610, em Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Wade родилась в 1589 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William Wade и Maria Preestlay. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cockcroft около 1610 г. в местности Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Wade nació en 1589, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de William Wade y Maria Preestlay. Se casó con William Cockcroft aproximadamente 1610, en Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
